hooks.command: git config core.hooksPath .githooks; Write-Host 'Git hooks path set to .githooks'

$input_json = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $cmd = $input_json.tool_input.command; if ($cmd -match '^git commit') { Write-Host 'Running tests before commit...'; dotnet test 'Bonfire.sln' --no-build --nologo -v q; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { @{ continue = $false; stopReason = 'Tests failed — commit blocked. Fix failing tests first.' } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } }
